Discuss the opportunity
01Use the Data02Extract Intelligence03Enable Delivery

Driving mission value for DCAA

Enterprise audit intelligence for trusted history, predictive planning, and comparable contractor-cost insight.

Peregrine brings financial-regulatory mission fluency, all-Exceptional SEC prime performance on AI and data contracts, and Azure strategy-through-production delivery at PCAOB and DDOT to DCAA's Azure Databricks lakehouse.

One enterprise data source: DCAA lakehouse

DCAA intended product

Where is audit performance improving, slowing, or changing across time, organizations, assignments, and relevant dimensions?

Role-relevant dashboards, queryable models, quality status, business definitions, and traceable source evidence.Review this DCAA intended product
01All-Exceptional CPARS on current SEC prime call ordersAll-Exceptional CPARS on current SEC prime call ordersThree completed SEC CPARS evaluations rate every displayed category Exceptional across Data Science and Use, Data Visualization, and Data Governance.
02Azure at PCAOB and DDOTAzure at PCAOB and DDOTPCAOB and DDOT show Peregrine carrying enterprise-data strategy, governance, pipelines, and mission products into Azure production.
03Financial-regulatory depthFinancial-regulatory depthSEC and PCAOB provide financial-regulatory experience, while NYDFS adds policy and governance work supporting supervisory decisions.
04SBA 8(a) prime and GSA MAS contract holderSBA 8(a) prime and GSA MAS contract holderPeregrine is an SBA 8(a) prime and holds GSA Multiple Award Schedule contract 47QTCA23D0028 under SIN 54151S, Information Technology Professional Services. Federal procurement approaches remain subject to the Contracting Officer's independent research, planning, eligibility confirmation, and approvals.

About Peregrine

A federal data and AI partner built for mission value

Peregrine combines federal data policy, enterprise architecture, engineering, human-centered analytics, responsible AI, and a history of stellar delivery to help DCAA create greater mission value from agency-owned information while preserving traceability, human judgment, and disciplined execution.

  • SBA 8(a) prime
  • Financial-regulatory mission fluency
  • Strategy-through-production delivery
  • Senior, multidisciplinary leadership
01

Immediate acquisition relevance

Mission-driven DCAA intended outcomes, Peregrine capabilities, and past performance

The matrix below provides a complete view of Peregrine's intended delivery, our approach to the solution, and relevant experience.

DCAA intended outcomes mapped to Peregrine capabilities and relevant past performance
DCAA intended outcomePeregrine capability and approachRelevant past performance
01One trusted view of audit performance across historical and current systemsIntegrates complex source data, reconciles identity and lineage, and creates durable analytical models and governed data products.

Peregrine problem-solving method

Design + Systems + Agile

Peregrine's P-DSA approach combines design thinking, a systems approach, and Agile methods into one problem-solving framework. Design identifies users, problems, and value. Systems evaluates the complete ecosystem and viable options. Agile delivers working increments with continuous feedback and acceptance.

01Design

Identify users, define the problem, structure value, and explore viable options.

02Systems

Evaluate the complete ecosystem, experiment, measure, learn, and select the solution path.

03Agile

Build, review, and release working increments through client-compatible delivery cycles.

02

DCAA background and approach

Use the data. Extract the intelligence. Enable delivery.

Three connected actions organize DCAA's data, analytical, and delivery requirements.

Connection to DCAA requirements

Use the dataBuild the trusted foundation
DCAA data lakehouse requirements focus
Source integration, historical preservation, data quality, metadata, lineage, security, and governed lakehouse engineering.
Requested mission outcome
Connect historical and current systems, standardize records, preserve provenance, and make complete data available for approved analytical use.
Why it matters
Creates dependable inputs for every dashboard, model, workload estimate, and contractor-cost comparison.
DCAA agency missionDCAA Strategic Plan 2026–2030DCAA 2026 agency overviewDCAA hub transition

DCAA's transition to 23 hub locations increases the value of consistent enterprise data, reusable analytical services, and role-relevant access across distributed operations.

03

Use the data

Build a foundation that preserves history, meaning, and evidence.

Peregrine connects source context, historical structures, governed semantic layers, machine-readable metadata, lineage, analytical models, and operating controls into an AI-ready Azure Databricks decision platform.

01

Selected layer

Source context

Profile each source, define controlled mappings, retain history, route exceptions, and reconcile entities before data becomes analytical evidence.

Relevant past performance Source context past performanceSEC CAT, PCAOB, DDOT, and FDA demonstrate experience with source integration, historical preservation, data quality, metadata, lineage, security, and governed analytical delivery.SEC CAT source transformation; PCAOB enterprise ingestion; DDOT multi-source warehouses and pipelines.
Preserve provenanceConnect every result to source evidence and transformation history.
Apply approved controlsWork inside DCAA-approved identity, network, repository, security, and release boundaries.
Design for AI readiness and reuseBuild governed semantic layers, machine-readable metadata, retrieval-ready knowledge assets, reusable data products, and documented operating knowledge.
04

Extract the intelligence

Trusted performance history, predictive assignment planning, and comparable contractor-cost intelligence make the lakehouse operational.

Each DCAA intended product begins with the decision the agency needs to make, then connects the data foundation, analytical method, user experience, acceptance criteria, and relevant Peregrine past performance.

01

DCAA intended product

Trusted performance history

Where is audit performance improving, slowing, or changing across time, organizations, assignments, and relevant dimensions?

Data foundation

Reconciled historical and current records, durable identity, preserved provenance, and governed semantic measures.

Analytical method

Time-series and cohort analysis, trends, variance, segmentation, drill paths, and transparent calculations.

User experience

Role-relevant dashboards, queryable models, quality status, business definitions, and traceable source evidence.

Acceptance evidence

Reconciliation, metric validation, source-to-output traceability, usability testing, and repeatable analytical results.

Relevant Peregrine past performanceSEC CAT analytics, DCStats, TeamStats, and market statistics; DDOT analytical products; PCAOB self-service roadmap.
05

Our capabilities

Our capabilities cover the full enterprise data-product lifecycle.

Nine capabilities span leadership, platform engineering, trusted data, decision products, user adoption, controls, production assurance, and sustainment. Each capability is assessed as Substantially exceeds.

Deliver

Decide

Assure

01

Deliver

Mission-Aligned Product and Program Leadership

Substantially exceeds

Turn DCAA's highest-value audit questions into governed products with visible progress and measurable acceptance.

DCAA outcome
Keep all three products connected to mission decisions, acceptance evidence, predictable increments, and Contracting Officer visibility.
Peregrine methods
Discovery, stakeholder mapping, product vision, prioritization, roadmaps, backlogs, Agile planning, risks, dependencies, demonstrations, decision logs, and outcome measures.
Relevant past performance
All-Exceptional SEC prime performance; PCAOB strategy-to-implementation; DDOT transformation and Agile delivery.
01
Mission-Aligned Product and Program LeadershipSubstantially exceeds

Turn DCAA's highest-value audit questions into governed products with visible progress and measurable acceptance.

DCAA outcome
Keep all three products connected to mission decisions, acceptance evidence, predictable increments, and Contracting Officer visibility.
Peregrine methods
Discovery, stakeholder mapping, product vision, prioritization, roadmaps, backlogs, Agile planning, risks, dependencies, demonstrations, decision logs, and outcome measures.
Relevant past performance
All-Exceptional SEC prime performance; PCAOB strategy-to-implementation; DDOT transformation and Agile delivery.
02
Secure Azure Databricks Lakehouse and Pipeline EngineeringSubstantially exceeds

Build DCAA's lakehouse as a secure enterprise decision platform with observable, reusable production pipelines.

DCAA outcome
Move historical, current, contractor-cost, and future sources through a secure, scalable, observable architecture optimized for reliability, performance, and cost.
Peregrine methods
Architecture, governed zones, source profiling, schema mapping, ETL and ELT, incremental loading, orchestration, observability, tuning, automation, and documentation.
Relevant past performance
PCAOB managed Azure implementation; DDOT Azure warehouses and pipelines; SEC CAT regulatory data; FDA FiDLE engineering in AWS.
03
Data Modeling, Standardization, Quality, and TraceabilitySubstantially exceeds

Preserve history, standardize meaning, and make every result traceable to trusted source data.

DCAA outcome
Create complete, unique, reconciled, standardized, queryable, and defensible data across history and contractor-cost submissions.
Peregrine methods
Data Vault, dimensional models, canonical schemas, semantics, taxonomies, master data, profiling, matching, deduplication, validation, exceptions, lineage, and regression tests.
Relevant past performance
SEC CAT transformation, hashing, quality, metadata, and governance; PCAOB master and critical data; DDOT policy and catalog; financial-reporting semantic expertise.
04
Historical Audit Performance IntelligenceSubstantially exceeds

See the complete audit-performance story, from enterprise trends to assignment-level evidence.

DCAA outcome
Explore year-over-year performance across historical and current eras by organization, assignment, time, and relevant dimensions.
Peregrine methods
Metric design, time-series and cohort analysis, trends, variance, segmentation, analytical views, dashboards, and drill paths.
Relevant past performance
SEC CAT analytics, market statistics, DCStats, and TeamStats; DDOT safety, mobility, and geospatial analytics; PCAOB self-service roadmap.
05
Predictive Assignment Planning and Model AssuranceSubstantially exceeds

Predict assignment effort with measurable accuracy, visible uncertainty, and transparent model assurance.

DCAA outcome
Provide defensible budget-hour ranges with measurable baseline improvement, visible uncertainty, transparent features, reproducible validation, and human review.
Peregrine methods
Feature engineering, baseline design, holdout testing, cross-validation, error comparison, interval estimation, explainability, registry, monitoring, and interface integration.
Relevant past performance
SEC analytics and AI; FDA AI and ML; DDOT optimization and prediction; PCAOB predictive-risk roadmap.
06
Contractor-Cost Intelligence and Comparative AnalyticsSubstantially exceeds

Convert varied cost schedules into comparable intelligence while preserving financial meaning and source provenance.

DCAA outcome
Make contractor cost data queryable and comparable while retaining provenance and reviewable transformation logic.
Peregrine methods
Schema profiling, canonical cost taxonomy, mappings, normalization, provenance, exceptions, conformed dimensions, comparative measures, trends, and review workflows.
Relevant past performance
SEC financial-regulatory data; PCAOB enterprise strategy and governance; NYDFS digital-asset policy framework development and implementation; financial-risk and semantic expertise.
07
Self-Service Analytics, Interfaces, and Human-Centered AdoptionSubstantially exceeds

Make every decision experience intuitive, role-relevant, accessible, and traceable.

DCAA outcome
Enable independent, accessible, role-relevant use of dashboards, interfaces, and governed models.
Peregrine methods
User research, information architecture, dashboards, applications, semantic metrics, accessibility, responsive design, usability testing, training, and adoption measures.
Relevant past performance
All-Exceptional SEC visualization work; DDOT P-DSA and human-centered products; FDA reporting; PCAOB self-service roadmap.
08
Data Governance, Security, and AuditabilitySubstantially exceeds

Make governance, security, and auditability operational across the full data-product lifecycle.

DCAA outcome
Make ownership, meaning, approved use, access, quality, and change history explicit across the lifecycle.
Peregrine methods
Governance, stewardship, glossary, catalog, critical data, policy, data-use assessment, lineage, role-based and attribute-based access, least privilege, encryption, logging, Zero Trust, privacy, and control evidence.
Relevant past performance
SEC governance and security; PCAOB governance and access management; DDOT governance institutionalization; FDA security and Zero Trust.
09
Production Assurance, DevSecOps, and Knowledge TransferSubstantially exceeds

Move every change through visible quality, security, performance, documentation, and ownership gates, with optional federal SDLC automation available.

DCAA outcome
Release predictably, preserve quality and security records, and transfer source artifacts, standard operating procedures, training, runbooks, and operating knowledge.
Peregrine methods
Version control, continuous integration and delivery, infrastructure and configuration as code, automated data and model tests, security scans, release gates, observability, optimization, rollback, documentation-as-work, training, transition, and transfer acceptance.
Relevant past performance
All-Exceptional SEC prime performance; SEC production engineering; FDA secure cloud; PCAOB managed service; DDOT production and institutionalization.
Optional integrated innovation path
06

DCAA-governed evaluation

Optional federal SDLC automation within DCAA's approved ecosystem.

Through its partnership with Inadev, Peregrine can make Ceebit available through an at-cost evaluation focused on a DCAA-selected internal product-development workflow.

Ceebit is an agentic-AI orchestration tool that coordinates work across approved requirements, code, testing, documentation, security, pipeline, quality, and release systems. It operates through technologies and workflows DCAA authorizes.

DCAA defines the use case, environment, controls, human review gates, measures, and continuation decision. The same delivery pattern can use Ceebit, another approved orchestration tool, or a Peregrine-built capability.

  1. 01
    DCAA selects a bounded workflow

    DCAA defines the internal data-product use case, approved inputs, environment, approval points, and measurable outputs.

  2. 02
    Approved systems coordinate work

    The orchestration layer can structure requirements, refine code, prepare tests, trigger security checks, update documentation, and coordinate release preparation.

  3. 03
    People authorize every consequential step

    Named reviewers approve requirements, architecture, code, tests, security findings, release artifacts, and production action.

  4. 04
    DCAA measures and decides

    DCAA reviews cycle time, manual touch time, test completeness, defects, security findings, documentation, traceability, rework, and reviewer satisfaction.

  5. 05
    DCAA retains the complete record

    DCAA retains code, artifacts, repository history, documentation, configuration knowledge, and continuation authority.

USCIS FINCH Analytics

Inadev leads the five-year FINCH Analytics program supporting fraud identification through data science, analytics, Agile delivery, DevSecOps, and human-centered design.

IRS mission solutions

Inadev supports the IRS Return Preparer Strategy and an augmented-reality mobile tax-compliance solution. These federal programs demonstrate operating depth and remain distinct from Ceebit product performance.

Governance

Least privilege, approved model and tool use, controlled data movement, activity logging, artifact review, and alignment with software and AI governance.

Human oversight

Named reviewers approve requirements, architecture, code, tests, security findings, release artifacts, and production action.

DCAA ownership

DCAA retains code, artifacts, repository history, documentation, configuration knowledge, continuation authority, and technology-selection authority.

Federal past performance

Peregrine and Inadev collaborate on SEC FarPoint. Inadev brings additional USCIS FINCH and IRS operating experience that remains distinct from Ceebit product performance.

07

Past performance: creating client value through delivery

Exceptional value across every evaluated category on three SEC prime call orders.

Peregrine serves as prime across connected data science and use, data visualization, and data governance workstreams, translating complex financial-regulatory data into sustained mission capability.

ALLExceptional CPARS across current SEC prime call orders
3Current SEC prime call orders evaluated
2018SEC delivery continuity progressing to accountable prime leadership

SEC prime call order

Data Science and Use

Federal award 50310225F0001

Regulatory data engineering, CAT transformation, market statistics, crypto analytics, AI research, product ownership, strategy, training, and sustained production delivery.

QualityExceptional
ScheduleExceptional
Cost ControlExceptional
ManagementExceptional
Small BusinessExceptional
Regulatory ComplianceExceptional
DeliveryExceptional
Relevant past performance

CAT captures trillions of equity and options order lifecycle records at petabyte-to-exabyte scale. Peregrine designs, develops, implements, operates, and improves secure ETL and derived-data pipelines for the SEC's largest, most complex, mission-critical dataset.

Value created for the client

Peregrine converted previously intractable raw CAT data into lifecycle-, account-, and aggregate-level analytical products; improved hashing, search, linkage, and query performance; and supported analytics that contributed to detection of a $47 million front-running scheme. The OCDO, OIT, and Peregrine team's CAT work led to the SEC Chair's Analytical Innovations Award.

Peregrine leads a prime team that includes Accenture Federal Services. AWS is also a member of Peregrine's team.

08

Our Azure experience

A common strategic approach created production value for PCAOB and DDOT.

PCAOB demonstrates financial-regulatory enterprise-data strategy carried into managed Azure implementation. DDOT demonstrates Azure engineering, mission products, governance, and adoption in an operational setting.

Financial regulationPCAOBStrategy · Governance · Managed service
Azure delivery spine
Mission operationsDDOTData products · Governance · Adoption

Financial regulation

PCAOBEnterprise data strategy carried into managed Azure implementation

Peregrine developed the Enterprise Data Strategy across governance, access management, enterprise ETL, the enterprise data hub, master and critical data, analytics, GenAI, and implementation priorities. With documented leadership support, Peregrine is leading implementation of Enterprise Data as a Managed Service in Azure.

Value created for the client
  • Governance, decision rights, stewardship, access, and critical-data management
  • Enterprise data hub and ingestion-factory capabilities
  • Self-service analytics and reusable analytical services
  • Predictive-risk models and AI-enabled workflows
  • Managed operating practices and knowledge transfer
DCAA relevance

Direct financial-regulatory mission context, Azure implementation, enterprise-data strategy, governance, ingestion, self-service analysis, predictive analytics, AI, and strategy-to-production continuity.

Mission operations

DDOTAzure data products and governance applied to safety, mobility, and resident outcomes

Peregrine helped DDOT modernize in Azure and embed data and AI into mission services through enterprise data warehouses and pipelines, governance, mobility and geospatial analytics, human-centered products, and sustained adoption.

Value created for the client
  • Azure warehouses, pipelines, and TOPS 2.0 modernization
  • DDOT's first Data Governance Council and implemented Data Policy
  • Digital Asset Catalog architecture
  • Vision Zero, geospatial, and dockless-mobility analytics
  • Parking-space optimization for residents
  • Human-centered design, Agile delivery, and data-culture change
DCAA relevance

Azure engineering, multiple-source integration, mission analytics, optimization, dashboards, human-centered products, governance, adoption, and sustained transformation.

09

Deep cloud expertise

Secure delivery discipline transfers across missions and clouds.

Azure provides direct platform experience. AWS demonstrates regulated federal scale and secure AI. Google Cloud demonstrates portability and product-development breadth. Every path flows into DCAA's approved ecosystem.

01AzurePCAOB · DDOT
02AWSSEC · FDA
03Google CloudPortable product engineering
DCAAApproved Azure Databricks ecosystem
01

Azure

PCAOB and DDOT

Direct enterprise-data, analytical-product, governance, and implementation experience.

02

AWS

SEC and FDA

High-volume regulatory data, secure AI, pipeline engineering, analytical services, and production operations.

03

Google Cloud

Private-sector and internal products

Portable product engineering, data science, modern development, and method independence.

04

DCAA-approved ecosystem

Azure Databricks and approved agency controls

Architecture and delivery grounded in DCAA's environment, security posture, operating model, and ownership requirements.

AWS

SEC subcontract continuity

Peregrine's SEC data and visualization experience began in a subcontract role in 2018 and progressed to prime leadership across three related call orders.

AWS

FDA FiDLE

Documented subcontract delivery across AI and ML, data engineering, cloud architecture, data security, Zero Trust, enterprise reporting, and production support.

Financial regulation

NYDFS

Peregrine developed and implemented a digital-asset policy framework and strengthened data governance supporting supervisory decisions.

Google Cloud

Private-sector and internal products

Economic consulting and internal product development demonstrate portable data science, product engineering, and method independence.

10

Representative solutioning team

Senior depth across mission, platform, DevSecOps, analytics, and governance.

The representative team brings executive leadership, enterprise architecture, technical quality, responsible AI, implementation, and data-policy depth aligned to DCAA's priorities.

SK

Executive Sponsor

Sarosh R. Khan

Founder and Chief Executive Officer

Sarosh founded Peregrine and leads executive strategy, client alignment, enterprise transformation, and mission-value delivery across regulated federal, economic, and data and AI environments.

DCAA focus

DCAA's mission protects the integrity of federal spending and public trust. Peregrine can help create greater mission value from enterprise information while preserving audit rigor, independence, and human judgment.

Solution contribution
Executive alignment, senior stakeholder engagement, institutional barrier removal, escalation, client-value assurance, and accountable prime leadership.
Capability coverage
Capabilities 1, 7, 8, and 9
Relevant background
SEC, PCAOB, DDOT, and other mission organizations.
Education
M.P.A., Harvard University; B.S. in Economics, Northeastern University

Senior team members from Inadev

Specialized federal engineering and innovation depth

Inadev adds focused federal engineering, cloud-native delivery, and AI-enabled product depth to the integrated team.

Manish AgarwalChief Executive Officer

Corporate leadership and access to specialized federal engineering resources.

Paul MatteucciFederal Partner

Federal modernization, financial-agency context, and stakeholder alignment.

Vikrant BinjrajkaFounder and Chief Technology Officer

Cloud-native engineering, AI-enabled delivery, and Ceebit technical direction.

Jitesh SachdevFounder and President

Enterprise product, engineering-delivery, and organizational scaling.

Review the optional innovation path

Next steps

Bring enterprise audit intelligence into focus.

Peregrine combines relevant financial-regulatory and Azure experience with federal and DoW procurement readiness: SBA 8(a), active SAM.gov registration, CAGE 8DZL0, UEI MJGLSKTGZS68, and GSA Multiple Award Schedule contract 47QTCA23D0028 under SIN 54151S, Information Technology Professional Services.

Email Peregrine about DCAA
Procurement readiness CMMC documentationSupporting documentation for CMMC Status: Final Level 2 (C3PAO) is available upon request.
  • SBA 8(a) prime
  • Active SAM.gov registration, CAGE 8DZL0, UEI MJGLSKTGZS68
  • GSA MAS 47QTCA23D0028, SIN 54151S
  • CMMC Status: Final Level 2 (C3PAO)
  • Social enterprise organized as a State of Maryland Benefit Corporation
  • All-Exceptional CPARS on current prime contracts
  • Sustained record of excellent federal data and technology delivery
  • Direct Azure and financial-regulatory experience
Appendix

Our understanding of DCAA

An audit agency operating at enterprise scale while transforming through data and technology.

DCAA provides independent audit and financial expertise to ensure accountability, transparency, and trust in defense contracting. The agency supports DoW and other federal customers by examining contractor costs, advising procurement teams, and strengthening confidence that public funds are used effectively.

$788.4BContract costs examined in FY2025
$5.3BAudit services savings in FY2025
$7.5:1Return for every dollar invested
~9,000Contractors within agency oversight
~10,000Products issued each year
$633.0MFY2026 budget request

Strategic direction

Three priorities frame DCAA's transformation

01

Optimize value and customer service

Improve the timeliness, relevance, and mission value of audit and financial advisory services for strategic partners.

02

Cultivate a premier and multi-talented workforce

Equip a distributed workforce with modern skills, consistent methods, and technology that strengthens professional judgment.

03

Capitalize on technological innovation

Modernize data, analytics, systems, and operating practices to increase insight, consistency, and enterprise performance.

Operating model

A distributed enterprise with mission directorates and hub-based delivery

  • Headquarters, Inspector General, Operations, and Equal Employment Opportunity functions
  • Land, Sea, Air, and Centralized Audit Function directorates
  • Transition toward 23 hub locations while maintaining presence at key contractor sites
  • Support for DoW buying commands and other federal customers across the contract lifecycle

Operating context

Scale, timing, and professional judgment shape the technology requirement

  • Audit workload follows DoW procurement funding with a time lag created by contract execution and closeout.
  • DCAA targets completion of incurred-cost audits within 12 months of an adequate submission.
  • The hub model increases the importance of consistent enterprise data, shared analytical services, and role-relevant access.
  • Technology must augment professional judgment, preserve traceability, and operate within agency governance and security controls.

Data and technology emphasis

The opportunity is an enterprise operating capability

Modernization connects governed data, analytical products, controlled AI, modern architecture, cybersecurity, and workforce enablement into a consistent agency capability.

01

Enterprise data foundation

Expand the lake and lakehouse, improve enterprise access, and standardize reusable data products across distributed operations.

02

Analytics and controlled AI

Use data-driven insights, AI and LLM-enabled targeted reviews, and GenAI guardrails while preserving audit independence and human judgment.

03

Modern architecture and tools

Streamline tools and processes, modernize IT architecture, and strengthen integration, cybersecurity, governance, and operational resilience.

04

Workforce enablement

Give auditors and leaders role-relevant access, transparent measures, training, and analytical services that are usable across hubs and contractor locations.

Official DCAA sourcesDCAA Strategic Plan 2026–2030DCAA 2026 agency overviewDCAA hub transition
Prepared for procurement and mission leadership for DCAAPrepared exclusively for DCAA procurement and mission evaluation. Please do not distribute outside authorized DCAA procurement, legal, technical, and mission personnel without Peregrine's written consent. Content remains subject to independent procurement review and required approvals.
